title: WebSockets Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the full-duplex versus request-response (HTTP) model, the role of Socket.io for automatic reconnections/broadcasting, and the need for instant server pushes for modern apps.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily design philosophy of 'WebSockets' compared to standard HTTP?
options: A full-duplex, low-latency connection where both the client and server can send data anytime without re-establishing a new request.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Standard HTTP uses which model for data exchange between a browser and a server?
Which popular Node.js library provides a more robust and easier-to-use API for WebSockets, including automatic reconnections?
Which WebSocket event is commonly used to send a message to 'everyone' currently connected to the server?
Does using WebSockets allowing you to build truly Fullstack applications by enabling real-time features like chat or live notifications?
options: Yes, by providing a way for the server to 'push' data directly to the client as soon as it is available.
